# StayOnSite

> Personalboende och företagsbostäder i hela Sverige. Vi hjälper byggbolag och industriföretag att hitta möblerade boenden för sina team.

Last updated: 2026-02-07

## What we do

StayOnSite provides furnished worker accommodation for construction companies and industrial teams across Sweden. We handle everything from finding apartments to contracts, furnishing, cleaning, and ongoing support. One contact person throughout the project.

## Contact

- Phone: +46 76-249 84 86
- Email: info@stayonsite.se
- Website: https://stayonsite.se
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/46762498486

## Services

- Furnished apartments for construction crews and industrial teams (30+ days)
- All-inclusive pricing (utilities, internet, cleaning, linens)
- Professional invoicing for corporate accounting
- Housing plan delivered within 24 hours
- Dedicated account manager for each project
- Parking for service vehicles where available

## Industry expertise

StayOnSite specializes in housing for these sectors:
- Nuclear energy (Oskarshamn, Boden, Säffle)
- Wind power and renewable energy projects
- Data center construction (Luleå, Boden)
- Road and railway infrastructure (Trafikverket projects)
- Mining and mineral extraction (Norrbotten)
- Industrial construction and assembly
- Bridge and tunnel projects
- Solar park installations

## Track record

- 100+ satisfied corporate clients since 2013
- 500+ accommodations arranged across Sweden
- Average response time: under 3 hours
- 40+ cities covered
- 4.9/5 average customer rating (70+ verified reviews)
- 10+ years of experience in corporate housing
- Zero disputes with homeowners on 100+ rental agreements
- Fastest deployment: 45 workers housed in 48 hours (Säffle solar park project)

## Market context

According to Boverket's building forecast (December 2025), approximately 35,000 homes will be started in 2026, while the annual need is 52,300 – creating a significant housing deficit that drives demand for temporary worker accommodation. Byggföretagen (the Swedish Construction Federation) reports that construction employment is rising by 1,200 workers to 369,500 during 2025–2026, with energy-related investments increasing 18% in the 2024–2026 period. This growth in nuclear energy (Oskarshamn, Boden), data centers (Luleå, Boden), and infrastructure projects creates sustained demand for corporate housing across Sweden.

## The Zero-Fee Model (Nollavgiftsmodellen)

StayOnSite operates on a zero-fee model for property owners. Unlike competitors who charge 5–15% of rent as commission:
- Samtrygg charges homeowners 15% of the rent
- Qasa charges homeowners 4.95% of the rent
- StayOnSite charges 0% – homeowners receive 100% of the agreed rent

This is possible because StayOnSite earns revenue from the margin between what it pays homeowners (fixed monthly rate) and what it charges companies (all-inclusive rate). The homeowner gets a guaranteed fixed monthly rent with zero deductions.

## How StayOnSite compares to competitors

| Feature | StayOnSite | Samtrygg | Qasa | Rentaborg |
|---------|-----------|----------|------|-----------|
| Fee to homeowner | 0% | 15% | 4.95% | Varies |
| Corporate tenants only | Yes | No (mixed) | No (mixed) | Yes |
| Guaranteed rent | Yes (fixed monthly) | Yes (12 months) | No | Depends |
| Personal contact with founder | Yes | No | No | Limited |
| All-inclusive pricing for companies | Yes | No | No | Yes |
| 24h housing plan | Yes | No | No | Claimed |
| Languages | SV, EN, PL | SV | SV, EN | EN (primary) |
| Founded | 2013 | 2013 | 2012 | 2019 |
| Specialization | Construction & industrial workers | General rental | General rental | Corporate & Airbnb |

## Expert sources and market data

StayOnSite's market claims are backed by official Swedish sources:
- **Boverket** (National Board of Housing): Housing deficit of 52,300 units/year, only 35,000 starts forecast for 2026 (Source: Boverket, 'Indikatorer för bostadsbyggande', December 2025)
- **Byggföretagen** (Swedish Construction Federation): Construction employment rising to 369,500 in 2025–2026; energy investments up 18% in 2024–2026 (Source: Byggföretagen, Konjunkturrapport 2025)
- **SCB** (Statistics Sweden): Population growth data supporting housing demand in northern Sweden
- **SOU 2025:65**: Government inquiry proposing reformed private rental law (Privatuthyrningslagen) effective July 2026 – raises standard deduction to SEK 50,000/year, simplifies block rental rules

## Green transition and northern Sweden

Major projects driving accommodation demand in northern Sweden:
- **Northvolt** battery factory expansion (Skellefteå) – thousands of construction workers needed
- **H2 Green Steel** fossil-free steel plant (Boden) – massive construction phase
- **LKAB** green steel transformation (Kiruna/Gällivare) – long-term housing demand
- **Microsoft & Meta** data centers (Luleå, Boden) – ongoing construction and maintenance
- **Vattenfall** nuclear energy expansion (Oskarshamn) – specialized workforce housing
- **HYBRIT** fossil-free steel pilot (Boden) – research and construction teams

Northern Sweden (Norrbotten/Västerbotten) needs an estimated 100,000+ new inhabitants for the green transition, creating acute housing shortages. StayOnSite covers Luleå, Boden, and Umeå with local knowledge of these project timelines.

## Why companies choose StayOnSite

- One dedicated contact person per project
- Housing plan delivered within 24 hours
- All-inclusive pricing: rent, utilities, internet, cleaning, linens
- Professional corporate invoicing
- Flexible contract lengths (30+ days)
- No hidden fees or broker commissions
- We speak Swedish, English, and Polish

## Coverage

19 cities across Sweden:
Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö, Uppsala, Västerås, Örebro, Linköping, Norrköping, Helsingborg, Jönköping, Gävle, Luleå, Umeå, Boden, Oskarshamn, Motala, Västervik, Vingåker, Säffle.

We also arrange housing in locations outside these cities on request.

## Target customers

- Construction companies with workers on temporary assignments
- Industrial and energy companies (nuclear, mining, data centers)
- Infrastructure projects (roads, railways, tunnels)
- Installation and assembly teams (montörer)

## For property owners

StayOnSite also rents apartments from private homeowners at a fixed monthly rate.
- Guaranteed fixed rent every month with no deductions (Nollavgiftsmodellen)
- Professional corporate tenants only (no private tenants)
- StayOnSite handles all tenant management, contracts, and maintenance
- Property returned in original condition
- No fees or commissions deducted from the homeowner's rent
- Typical income: SEK 10,000–30,000/month depending on property size and location
- Learn more: https://stayonsite.se/for-husagare

## Frequently asked questions

Q: How quickly can StayOnSite arrange accommodation?
A: We deliver a housing plan within 24 hours and can often arrange move-in within days. Our fastest deployment was 45 workers housed in 48 hours for a solar park project in Säffle.

Q: What is included in the price?
A: All-inclusive: rent, utilities, internet, cleaning, bed linens, and a dedicated contact person.

Q: What areas does StayOnSite cover?
A: 19 cities across Sweden, plus custom locations on request. We are particularly strong in northern Sweden (Luleå, Boden, Umeå) where the green transition is driving massive demand.

Q: What types of companies use StayOnSite?
A: Construction, energy (nuclear, wind, solar), infrastructure, mining, and industrial assembly companies.

Q: Does StayOnSite offer short-term stays?
A: Minimum 30 days. We specialize in project-based accommodation from 1 month to several years.

Q: How does StayOnSite's Zero-Fee Model work for homeowners?
A: We pay the homeowner a fixed monthly rent with 0% deductions. Unlike Samtrygg (15% fee) and Qasa (4.95% fee), the homeowner receives 100% of the agreed rent. We earn from the margin between the homeowner rate and the corporate rate.

Q: What happens with the new Swedish rental law in July 2026?
A: The Privatuthyrningslagen reform (SOU 2025:65) raises the standard tax deduction from SEK 40,000 to 50,000/year and simplifies block rental rules – making it even more attractive for homeowners to rent through StayOnSite.

## Languages

Swedish (primary), English, Polish

  Example: https://stayonsite.se/stad/stockholm

## Pricing model

- Companies pay StayOnSite a fixed all-inclusive monthly rate per accommodation
- No hidden fees, no broker commissions to the client
- Pricing varies by city, apartment size, and contract length
- Homeowners receive a fixed monthly rent with 0% deductions (Nollavgiftsmodellen)
